chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Transfer Application No.10 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.2152/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection and reply as at “A” 3. For orders on M.A. No.2153/2025 (Exp/A) 4. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
